parameters.query:
SELECT marketing_config.config_data->>'learning_loop_lookback_days' AS lookback_days
FROM marketing_config
WHERE key = 'learning_loop_settings'
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  m.id, m.platform, m.likes, m.comments, m.shares, m.views, 
  m.engagement_rate, m.raw_payload, m.social_published_id, m.measured_at,
  sp.caption, sp.hashtags, sp.lang, sp.asset_type, sp.published_at,
  gcd.body, gcd.topic_tag
FROM metrics m
LEFT JOIN social_published sp ON m.social_published_id = sp.id
LEFT JOIN gemini_copy_drafts gcd ON sp.draft_id = gcd.id
WHERE m.measured_at >= $1::TIMESTAMP
ORDER BY m.measured_at DESC

INSERT INTO marketing_config (key, config_data, last_updated)
VALUES ('learning_loop_cold_start', '{"status": "cold_start", "reason": "no metrics in window", "uses_defaults": true}'::jsonb, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET config_data = EXCLUDED.config_data, last_updated = NOW()

INSERT INTO marketing_config (key, config_data, last_updated) 
VALUES 
  ('topic_scores', $1::jsonb, NOW()),
  ('top_hashtags', $2::jsonb, NOW()),
  ('best_post_times', $3::jsonb, NOW()),
  ('winning_formats', $4::jsonb, NOW()),
  ('lang_performance', $5::jsonb, NOW()),
  ('last_learning_run_at', $6::jsonb, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET config_data = EXCLUDED.config_data, last_updated = NOW()

INSERT INTO performance_insights (topic, metric_type, score, details, valid_until, created_at)
SELECT 
  topic,
  'topic_score' AS metric_type,
  (weighted_engagement_rate::FLOAT) AS score,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'count', count,
    'total_engagement', total_engagement,
    'total_impressions', total_impressions,
    'trend_recent_days', trend_recent_days
  ) AS details,
  NOW() + INTERVAL '24 hours' AS valid_until,
  NOW() AS created_at
FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) 
  AS t(topic TEXT, count INT, total_engagement BIGINT, total_impressions BIGINT, weighted_engagement_rate TEXT, trend_recent_days INT)

INSERT INTO performance_insights (topic, metric_type, score, details, valid_until, created_at)
SELECT 
  hashtag,
  'hashtag_score' AS metric_type,
  (avg_engagement::FLOAT) AS score,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'count', count,
    'total_engagement', total_engagement,
    'avg_engagement', avg_engagement
  ) AS details,
  NOW() + INTERVAL '24 hours' AS valid_until,
  NOW() AS created_at
FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) 
  AS t(hashtag TEXT, count INT, total_engagement BIGINT, avg_engagement TEXT)

UPDATE content_seeds 
SET perf_score = COALESCE(
  (SELECT (config_data->scores_by_topic->(topic_tag)::TEXT)::FLOAT 
   FROM marketing_config 
   WHERE key = 'topic_scores'),
  perf_score
),
modified_at = NOW()
WHERE topic_tag IS NOT NULL

parameters.functionCode:
return {
  execution_status: 'success',
  metrics_processed: $node["validate_metrics"].json.metrics_count,
  topic_scores_generated: $node["compute_topic_scores"].json.length,
  hashtag_scores_generated: $node["compute_hashtag_perf"].json.length,
  format_rankings: $node["compute_format_rank"].json.length,
  language_performance: $node["compute_lang_perf"].json.length,
  config_keys_updated: 6,
  insights_inserted: true,
  seeds_perf_updated: true,
  report_sent: true,
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
};
